name: Seven Holy Youths of Ephesus
venerable mother and martyr Eudocia
troparia: (Tone 4) What a marvel of faith!* The seven holy youths lived in a cave as in a palace,* and they passed on without corruption.* After time had marched on, they came out as if from sleep* and are fitting signs of the resurrection of all.* Have mercy on us, O Christ, through their prayers.
kontakia: (Tone 4) Despising the corruptible things of this world,* they received gifts which were incorruptible.* They died but did not decay.* Coming out after many years, they bury unbelief.* O faithful people, come to praise them today,* and let us raise a hymn to Christ.
